title: Buttery Crunchy Peruvian Egg Frittata
description: A vegan-friendly Peruvian dish featuring a buttery and crunchy egg frittata, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe incorporates fermented ingredients for added depth of flavor.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the vegan butter over medium heat.
Add the diced aji amarillo pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the sliced red onion and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the crumbled tofu, fermented vegan cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked onion and pepper mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch (23cm) pie plate or skillet.
Top with halved cherry tomatoes and chopped fresh cilantro.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
